ab: Cima saw kira vavainay?
Ci vaki nu maku cira.
Cima saw kira vavahian?
U kaka tu vavahian nu maku cira.
Cima saw kira wawa?
U sava tu vavainayan nu maku cira.
U mamaanay saw a demak ku demaken ni ina isu?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: U hitay cira.
U mimaanay saw ku demak ni ama nu misu?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: U pasevana’ay cira.
U sava haw nu misu cira?
Caay, u cavay nu sava tu vavainayan nu maku.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: U kaka tu vavahian haw nu misu cira?
Caay, u sava tu vavahian nu maku cira.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: Papina saw ku tamdaw nu luma’ nu heni?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: Lalima ku tamdaw nu luma’ nu heni.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: Papina saw ku wawa nu luma’ namu?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: Sasepat kami.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: Papina saw ku sava nu misu?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ku sava nu maku tu vavainayan, tatulu ku sava tu vavahian.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: Papina saw ku kaka nu misu?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ku kaka aku.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: Papina saw a malekaka kamu?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ku malekakaay nu maku.
U malekakaay haw kamu?
Hay, u kaka nu maku cira.
U Yincumin haw kamu?
Hay, u Yincumin kami.
U Pangcah haw cira?
Hay, u Pangcah cira.
